breadcrumb.title: Deep experience, dependable service.
breadcrumb.desc: Discover the company journey, business approach and core values of Set Otomotiv.

intro.title: We move forward with the goal of being a trusted name in the automotive sector.
intro.p1: Founded in Sivas in 1978, Set Otomotiv has operated with a focus on technology, innovation and continuous improvement in the automotive sector. Since its establishment, the company has grown steadily through professionalism, integrity and a market-building mindset.
intro.p2: By closely following changing industry needs, the company combines administrative and financial experience with solid organization to maintain a respected position in its field.
list: Focuses on products and materials with proven quality.
Aims to complete every process on time and above the expected quality level.
Ensures continuity with an experienced team and structured organization.

values.title: Trust
values.text: A clear, reliable and long-term approach in every business relationship.

values.title: Organization
values.text: Effective process management, supply planning and timely guidance.

values.title: Quality
values.text: A quality-focused approach supported by proven products and professional assistance.

cta.title: As the Set Otomotiv team, we move forward with modern management practices and reliable product selection.
cta.desc: Sincerely, Temel Ozelma - Chairman of the Board
